question: How does revenue split between men and women?
sql: SELECT u.gender, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) AS buyers, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price) / COUNT(DISTINCT u.id), 2) AS spend_per_buyer FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.users` u ON u.id = oi.user_id WHERE oi.status IN ('Complete', 'Shipped') GROUP BY u.gender
analyst_notes: Use users.gender (the buyer), not orders.gender (the department shopped — a mislabeled column in this dataset). Per-buyer spend alongside totals separates population size from behavior.
author: claude-draft
